ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group organizing the meeting */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group organizing the meeting */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of meeting (e.g., in-person, virtual, hybrid) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting (if in-person) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting chair */,
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary agenda */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_agenda_id FOREIGN KEY ("agenda_id") REFERENCES artifacts ("artifact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group leader */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the group's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the artifact belongs to */,
  "artifact_type" TEXT /* Type of artifact (e.g., agenda, bluesheet) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the artifact */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the artifact was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artifact */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the artifact */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the artifact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifacts_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifacts_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the recording belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the recording */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the recording was uploaded */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the recording */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recording */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the recording */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slides" (
  "slide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slide presentation */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the slide presentation belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the slide presentation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the slide presentation */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the slide presentation was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the slide presentation */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the slide presentation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the slide presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slides_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slides_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet-draft */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the internet-draft belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the internet-draft */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the internet-draft */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the internet-draft was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the internet-draft */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the internet-draft */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the internet-draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_drafts_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_drafts_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the attendee is attending */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attendee (e.g., chair, presenter, participant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the attendee is affiliated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the attendee */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the attendee actually attended the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the attendee is registering for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the meeting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outreach_pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outreach pilot */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the outreach pilot belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the outreach pilot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outreach pilot */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the outreach pilot */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the outreach pilot */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outreach pilot leader */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the outreach pilot (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outreach_pilots_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outreach_pilots_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
